title: azarolus crataegoides var. torulosa
intro: Azarolus crataegoides var. torulosa, also known as the Pygeum or African Cherry, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Azarolus crataegoides var. torulosa include supporting prostate health, reducing symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared as a supplement in capsule or tablet form, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures.
